section.heading: Parental bereavement leave

paragraph.content: the terms “employee” and “son or daughter” have the meanings given those terms in section 6381; and

paragraph.chapeau: the term “paid leave” means, with respect to an employee, leave without loss of or reduction in—

subparagraph.content: leave to which the employee is otherwise entitled under law; or

paragraph.heading: In general.—
paragraph.content: Subject to paragraphs (2) and (3), an employee shall be entitled to a total of 2 administrative workweeks of paid leave during any 12-month period because of the death of a son or daughter of the employee.

paragraph.heading: Limitation.—
paragraph.content: Leave under paragraph (1) may not be taken by an employee intermittently or on a reduced leave schedule unless the employee and the employing agency of the employee agree otherwise.

paragraph.heading: Notice.—
paragraph.content: In any case in which the necessity for leave under this subsection is foreseeable, the employee shall provide the employing agency with such notice as is reasonable and practicable.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 117–81, div. A, title XI, § 1111(a), Dec. 27, 2021, 135 Stat. 1953.)
